nasb.text: The Lord God has sworn by His holiness, “Behold, the days are coming upon you When they will take you away with meat hooks, And the last of you with fish hooks.

esv.text: The Lord God has sworn by his holiness that, behold, the days are coming upon you, when they shall take you away with hooks, even the last of you with fishhooks.

cnv.text: 主耶和華指著自己的聖潔起誓： “看哪！對付你們的日子快到， 人必用鈎子把你們鈎走， 最後一個也必被人用魚鈎鈎去。

ccb.text: 因此，主耶和华凭祂的圣洁起誓： “时候快到了， 有人要用鱼钩钩走你们，一个也不留。
